dict.string: Spotlight needs access to control other applications for launching them.
Spotlight needs camera access for screen capture features.
Spotlight needs microphone access for screen recording with audio.
Spotlight needs screen capture access to take screenshots and provide color picker functionality.
Spotlight needs accessibility access for global shortcuts and window management.
Spotlight needs access to send AppleEvents to other applications.
Spotlight needs access to your Desktop folder to search for files and applications.
Spotlight needs access to your Documents folder to search for files.
Spotlight needs access to your Downloads folder to search for files.
Spotlight needs access to removable volumes to search for files.
Spotlight needs to check for file provider extensions.
Spotlight needs access to app data for plugin storage.
